summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgentERP features. All requested features working correctly: New Chat button creates sessions directly, Analytics Dashboard shows intelligent dashboard with KPIs and tables, chat sessions persist and are selectable. Connected to live ERPNext at india-next.m.frappe.cloud.

minor.issue: AI service returns 429 rate limit errors (GitHub API), but direct pattern matching for analytics bypasses this successfully

ui_bugs.issue: Button nesting warning: delete button is nested inside chat session button, causing HTML validation warning

passed_tests: New Chat button creates chat session immediately on click
Analytics Dashboard button triggers comprehensive analytics view
Dashboard displays Total Sales KPI card (₹3,71,200.00)
Dashboard displays Customers KPI card (5 active customers)
Dashboard displays Outstanding KPI card (₹3,16,000.00 accounts receivable)
Dashboard shows Sales Orders by Status breakdown (Draft: 7, Completed: 5)
Dashboard shows Top Customers by Revenue table (3 customers)
Dashboard shows Items Catalog table (10 items)
Dashboard shows Recent Sales Orders table (10 orders)
Dashboard shows Recent Invoices table (5 invoices with outstanding amounts)
All table links open ERPNext in new tab (43 links verified)
Chat sessions persist and are selectable from sidebar (19 sessions)
Backend health endpoint returns live ERP mode
Chat session CRUD operations work correctly
Comprehensive analytics endpoint returns all required data
MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue fixed in create_chat_session
Direct pattern matching bypasses AI for analytics requests
critical_code_review_comments: ChatInterface.js line 356-385: Button nesting issue - delete button inside chat session button causes HTML validation warning. Consider restructuring to use span or moving delete outside button.
ChatInterface.js line 27: useEffect missing loadChatSessions dependency (ESLint warning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features implemented and working. AI service may return 429 rate limits but analytics requests bypass AI via direct pattern matching. Live ERPNext connection is active with real data from india-next.m.frappe.cloud. Backend tests in test_agenterp_api.py cover all API endpoints.
